steps.title: Place the underlined detail
steps.content: The passage first establishes the usual four-day winter migration of Tule geese. The underlined portion then describes the first part of that normal route from Bristol Bay over the Gulf of Alaska.

steps.title: Identify the route function
steps.content: Choice A wrongly says the detail shows a change, Choice B invents an explanation for breeding in Alaska, and Choice D invents a comparison with other birds. The underlined portion describes part of the geese's typical winter migration journey. The answer is C.
